heroHeadline: ICE Detention Hits Record 73,000 as DHS Shutdown Stalls Congressional Funding
heroSubtitle: Vermont mistaken-identity raid exposes ICE warrant gaps; TSA warns of airport closures on Day 41 of DHS shutdown; Senate Democrats demand ICE accountability reforms
footerNote: Data sourced from DHS, ICE official records, ACLU, HRW, DHS OIG, TRAC Reports, Detention Watch Network, court records, and Congressional records
